<!--
  Target branch: dev (default). Do NOT target master — that branch is release-only
  and PRs against it are auto-retargeted to dev. See CONTRIBUTING.md.
-->

## What & why

<!-- A short description of the change and the motivation behind it. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] PR targets `dev` (not `master`)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (`feat:` / `fix:` / `perf:` / `docs:` / …)
- [ ] `make` builds cleanly (no new warnings)
- [ ] `make test` passes; tests added/updated for behaviour changes
